title: cyclophyllum costatum
intro: Cyclophyllum costatum is a plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cyclophyllum costatum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Cyclophyllum costatum are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by extracting the active compounds using solvents, which can be used to treat various ailments.
